summary: EXP-276 P1 swap1 rewrite explicitly names BOTH closest pairs that halve into the 85-km band under the stricter R_disc/180 convention: Coimbra–San Pablo at Δr ≈ 75 km and Ebro–Coimbra at Δr ≈ 82 km, with parenthetical noting Ebro–San Pablo at 157 km still exceeds 85 km so all three Iberian stations cannot share the band simultaneously. "Max 2" remains correct; the reasoning is now tightened.
note: See EXP-276 expansion file for full replacement_html (full_section_replacement of #p4-427-station-coverage).
